title: Hieracium stenobracteum
intro: Hieracium stenobracteum, also known as the narrow-bracted hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium stenobracteum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Hieracium stenobracteum is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
